name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry's new exquisite shoulder bag, original single quality! Selected cotton canvas material, paired with exquisite leather details; decorated with brand Horseferry print and exquisite three rivets, can be worn on the shoulder or remove the strap to create a handbag style. 18 x 8 x 12cm, 4541
